qa_pairs.question: How does one load the prebuilt VASP version 6.4.2 on the Trillium cluster?
qa_pairs.answer: To load VASP version 6.4.2 on Trillium, you would execute the following commands: `module load StdEnv/2023 intel/2023.2.1 intelmpi/2021.9.0 hdf5/1.14.2`, followed by `module use /opt/software/commercial/modules`, and then `module load vasp/6.4.2`.

qa_pairs.question: Where are the VASP pseudopotential files located on the Cedar and Graham clusters, and how can users access them?
qa_pairs.answer: All VASP pseudopotential files are located in the `$EBROOTVASP/pseudopotentials/` directory on the Cedar and Graham clusters. These files can be accessed by users once the VASP module has been loaded.
